faqs.question: What methods do you use for cockroach extermination?
faqs.answer: We employ an integrated pest management approach combining gel baits, residual insecticides, growth regulators, and dust applications in wall voids and hard-to-reach areas. Our treatment plans are customized based on the cockroach species and infestation level, ensuring maximum effectiveness while maintaining safety for your family and pets.
